transcript.message: Interview session connected. Microphone is ready.
Microphone enabled. You can start speaking.
Interview started. Please introduce yourself and share what drew you to caregiving work.
Hi, I'm CareBot. This interview will take about 12 minutes. Short examples help. Please avoid private patient details. Ready?
Great. Let's get started. Question one: Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients did you work with and what services did you perform?
I mean, not officially, but I've helped family here and there. I'm a quick learner, so I can figure out on the spot.
Got it. Thanks for sharing. Question two: Imagine you're finding a caregiver for a loved one. What traits or skills would be most important to you?
Efficiency is key. Thanks for your input. That's all for now. We'll review and update you soon. Please leave the meeting by clicking the button below. Take care.
I mean someone who gets things done fast and doesn't make a big deal out of small things.
